snippet.title: Woman wakes up in the coffin at her funeral #shorts
snippet.description:
An Ecuadorian woman has risen from the 'dead' after almost being buried alive.

Shocking video footage shows the moment 76-year-old Bella Montoya was rescued from her coffin, after being stuck inside for over four hours.

The woman was declared deceased after suffering a stroke in hospital and taken to a local funeral home for preparations.

#BuriedAlive #Ecuador #BellaMontoya #Coffin #10NewsFirst

snippet.title: Why does Marshmello wear a mask?
snippet.description: @marshmello  quickly became the most famous DJ in the world but everyone has always tried to guess who the person is underneath the mask. Some people have even suggested that it may be a different person every time, but Marshmello said the real reason he wears the mask is because he doesn’t want fame. The mask connects him to people because when others put it on, they also become Marshmello.

localized.title: Why does Marshmello wear a mask?
localized.description: @marshmello  quickly became the most famous DJ in the world but everyone has always tried to guess who the person is underneath the mask. Some people have even suggested that it may be a different person every time, but Marshmello said the real reason he wears the mask is because he doesn’t want fame. The mask connects him to people because when others put it on, they also become Marshmello.

snippet.title: we met on a... website? 😮
snippet.description:
🔥 NEW!! Britain’s Got Talent 2024 is on FIRE! Watch HERE 👉: https://youtu.be/Q6XztMqXmzE
.
. Lexie and Christopher on Britain's Got Talent Full audition HERE: https://youtu.be/2KojeC9ABw4 .
.
Britain's Got Talent 2024 auditions (BGT 2024) is underway and it’s on FIRE! A Remarkable array of talents that rival America's Got Talent (AGT) in its diversity and creativity. The auditions for BGT 2024 were a spectacle in themselves, with moments that remind us of Susan Boyle, Calum Scott and MB14. The golden buzzer moments are particularly memorable, reminiscent of previous seasons' standout performances by the likes of Loren Allred, whose rendition of "Never Enough" from The Greatest Showman became a viral BGT sensation. This year, the show saw rising stars like Sydney Christmas with her unique rendition of Tomorrow. Even unexpected acts like Batman and the enchanting little girl who stole hearts with her soulful singing added to the charm of Britain's Got Talent 2024. With each episode, the competition is growing fiercer with singers, choir’s magic acts and so much more. STAY TUNED!

snippet.title: Small Tornado on a Parking Lot
snippet.description:
content is altered or ai generated #shorts 

Small Tornado on a Parking Lot

There are Four Major Kinds Of Storms: Thunderstorms, Tornadoes, Hurricane
How Do Tornadoes Form ?
Tornadoes form when warm, humid air collides with cold, dry air. The denser cold air is pushed over the warm air, usually producing thunderstorms. The warm air rises through the colder air, causing an updraft. The updraft will begin to rotate if winds vary sharply in speed or direction

Online shop https://vilonttornado.myshopify.com/

snippet.title: 50 Cent Bullied The Wrong Man, Terry Crews Exposed Him | Part 4 | #shorts
snippet.description:
See The FULL VIDEO right here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FWGLLnPUK70&t=1s

Terry Crews is widely known for his impressive physique, but when 50 Cent called him out for not being a real man, it sparked a heated debate online. The controversy arose after Terry publicly shared his experience with sexual assault and voiced his support for the #MeToo movement. Despite Terry's bravery, 50 Cent mocked him for not fighting back, revealing a deeper issue around masculinity and what it means to be a real man.

#terrycrews #50cent
